title: SessionClient doc example is rust,ignore — will silently rot
description: The doc example in SessionClient uses rust,ignore so it is never compiled. If chat_get signature changes or SessionClient is moved, the example silently becomes wrong. Use rust,no_run instead: that compiles the example without running it, catching type errors and import issues while still not requiring a live server. Change the fenced block from ```rust,ignore to ```rust,no_run and add the necessary use imports.
